text:
july 31
I had some dreams - I just woke up. I was gonna drive to beverly hills to go on a hike in the fog in a maybe spiritual way and someone’s boyfriend was gonna come with me. And then I was at a party and perhaps Stanley was explaining to me that when we fly in dreams, some people can do it in real life - it’s called “the vestibular sense” and it’s because of our inner ear hairs. I barely listened and thought maybe I can do it, and flew up to the ceiling but no one seemed that surprised, so I knew it was a dream (just a little disappointed but recovered quickly). I was narrating that guy making robot arms and realized I could do exactly reality amanda’s voice, and was saying that he could probably make a plane.
